title: OpenAI expands Codex beyond developers with role-specific plugins and shareable Sites
friendlyTitle: Codex is becoming a broader work assistant
summary: OpenAI announced new Codex plugins for data analytics, creative production, sales, design, investing and banking, plus annotations and a Sites preview for creating shareable interactive workspaces and apps.
friendlySummary: OpenAI added Codex tools for analysts, sales teams, designers, marketers and finance workers, along with ways to refine and share generated work.
whyItMatters: Codex is being positioned as a general knowledge-work engine, not only a coding assistant. For businesses, the useful shift is packaging workflows by role so teams can start from job-specific tools rather than blank prompts.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This makes AI more useful for everyday office work because people can begin with tools designed for their role instead of trying to invent the right prompt from scratch.
